parameters.jsCode:
const body = $input.first().json.body || $input.first().json;
const callData = body.call || body;
const customData = callData.call_analysis || {};
const metadata = callData.retell_llm_dynamic_variables || callData.metadata || {};
const transcript = callData.transcript || '';

return {
  retell_call_id: callData.call_id || '',
  from_number: callData.from_number || metadata.caller_phone || '',
  to_number: callData.to_number || '',
  started_at: callData.start_timestamp ? new Date(callData.start_timestamp).toISOString() : null,
  ended_at: callData.end_timestamp ? new Date(callData.end_timestamp).toISOString() : null,
  duration_sec: callData.duration_ms ? Math.round(callData.duration_ms / 1000) : null,
  transcript: transcript,
  recording_url: callData.recording_url || '',
  transferred: callData.call_status === 'transferred',
  call_status: callData.call_status || 'ended',
  
  intent: customData.intent || 'unknown',
  urgency: customData.urgency || 'low',
  customer_name: customData.customer_name || metadata.customer_name || '',
  phone: callData.from_number || metadata.caller_phone || '',
  year: customData.vehicle_year || null,
  make: customData.vehicle_make || '',
  model: customData.vehicle_model || '',
  issue_summary: customData.issue_summary || '',
  vehicle_drivable: customData.vehicle_drivable || 'unknown',
  preferred_day: customData.preferred_day || '',
  preferred_time: customData.preferred_time || '',
  needs_tow: customData.needs_tow || false,
  existing_customer: metadata.returning_customer === 'yes',
  human_transfer_requested: customData.human_transfer_requested || false,
  sentiment: customData.sentiment || 'neutral',
  follow_up_type: customData.follow_up_type || 'none',
  
  shop_name: metadata.shop_name || '',
  shop_number: callData.to_number || '',
  after_hours: metadata.shop_is_open === 'false'
};

parameters.query: SELECT id FROM shops WHERE main_number = '{{ $json.shop_number }}' LIMIT 1;

INSERT INTO callers (phone, name)
VALUES (
  '{{ $node['Extract Call Fields'].json.phone }}',
  '{{ $node['Extract Call Fields'].json.customer_name }}'
)
ON CONFLICT (phone) DO UPDATE SET
  name = COALESCE(NULLIF('{{ $node['Extract Call Fields'].json.customer_name }}', ''), callers.name),
  updated_at = now()
RETURNING id;

INSERT INTO vehicles (caller_id, year, make, model, drivable_status)
VALUES (
  '{{ $node['Upsert Caller'].json.id }}',
  {{ $node['Extract Call Fields'].json.year || 'NULL' }},
  '{{ $node['Extract Call Fields'].json.make }}',
  '{{ $node['Extract Call Fields'].json.model }}',
  '{{ $node['Extract Call Fields'].json.vehicle_drivable }}'
)
RETURNING id;

INSERT INTO calls (
  shop_id, caller_id, retell_call_id, from_number, to_number,
  started_at, ended_at, duration_sec, intent, urgency,
  summary, transcript, transferred, sentiment, recording_url,
  human_transfer_requested, after_hours, extracted_data
) VALUES (
  '{{ $node['Get Shop ID'].json.id }}',
  '{{ $node['Upsert Caller'].json.id }}',
  '{{ $node['Extract Call Fields'].json.retell_call_id }}',
  '{{ $node['Extract Call Fields'].json.from_number }}',
  '{{ $node['Extract Call Fields'].json.to_number }}',
  {{ $node['Extract Call Fields'].json.started_at ? "'" + $node['Extract Call Fields'].json.started_at + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $node['Extract Call Fields'].json.ended_at ? "'" + $node['Extract Call Fields'].json.ended_at + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $node['Extract Call Fields'].json.duration_sec || 'NULL' }},
  '{{ $node['Extract Call Fields'].json.intent }}',
  '{{ $node['Extract Call Fields'].json.urgency }}',
  '{{ $node['Extract Call Fields'].json.issue_summary }}',
  '{{ $node['Extract Call Fields'].json.transcript }}',
  {{ $node['Extract Call Fields'].json.transferred }},
  '{{ $node['Extract Call Fields'].json.sentiment }}',
  '{{ $node['Extract Call Fields'].json.recording_url }}',
  {{ $node['Extract Call Fields'].json.human_transfer_requested }},
  {{ $node['Extract Call Fields'].json.after_hours }},
  '{{ JSON.stringify($node['Extract Call Fields'].json) }}'
)
RETURNING id;

INSERT INTO appointment_requests (
  shop_id, caller_id, call_id, vehicle_id,
  requested_service, requested_day, requested_time, source
) VALUES (
  '{{ $node['Route by Intent'].json.shop_id }}',
  '{{ $node['Route by Intent'].json.caller_id }}',
  '{{ $node['Route by Intent'].json.call_id }}',
  {{ $node['Insert Vehicle'].json ? "'" + $node['Insert Vehicle'].json.id + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  '{{ $node['Extract Call Fields'].json.issue_summary }}',
  '{{ $node['Extract Call Fields'].json.preferred_day }}',
  '{{ $node['Extract Call Fields'].json.preferred_time }}',
  'voice_intake'
)
RETURNING id;

INSERT INTO tasks (
  shop_id, caller_id, call_id,
  task_type, priority, status,
  due_at, notes
) VALUES (
  '{{ $node['Route by Intent'].json.shop_id }}',
  '{{ $node['Route by Intent'].json.caller_id }}',
  '{{ $node['Route by Intent'].json.call_id }}',
  '{{ $node['Route by Intent'].json.task_type }}',
  '{{ $node['Route by Intent'].json.task_priority }}',
  'open',
  CASE
    WHEN '{{ $node['Route by Intent'].json.task_priority }}' = 'urgent' THEN now() + interval '15 minutes'
    WHEN '{{ $node['Route by Intent'].json.task_priority }}' = 'high' THEN now() + interval '1 hour'
    ELSE now() + interval '4 hours'
  END,
  '{{ $node['Extract Call Fields'].json.issue_summary }}'
)
RETURNING id;

INSERT INTO messages (shop_id, caller_id, call_id, message_type, sms_body, to_number, from_number, twilio_sid)
VALUES (
  '{{ $node['Build SMS'].json.shop_id }}',
  '{{ $node['Build SMS'].json.caller_id }}',
  '{{ $node['Build SMS'].json.call_id }}',
  'sms_outbound',
  '{{ $node['Build SMS'].json.body }}',
  '{{ $node['Build SMS'].json.to }}',
  '{{ $env.TWILIO_SMS_FROM }}',
  '{{ $json.sid || '' }}'
);

parameters.body: =URGENT: {{ $node['Extract Call Fields'].json.customer_name || 'Unknown caller' }} called about {{ $node['Extract Call Fields'].json.issue_summary || 'an urgent issue' }}. Vehicle: {{ $node['Extract Call Fields'].json.year || '' }} {{ $node['Extract Call Fields'].json.make || '' }} {{ $node['Extract Call Fields'].json.model || '' }}. Call back: {{ $node['Extract Call Fields'].json.phone }}

parameters.content:
## Post-Call Processor
Extracts structured data from Retell call.
Upserts caller + vehicle, inserts call record.
Routes by intent to create tasks, appointments, SMS.

call.transcript:
Agent: Hi, thanks for calling Mike's Auto Repair. How can I help you today?
User: Hi, my name is John Smith. I have a 2019 Toyota Camry and the check engine light came on. It's also running a bit rough.
Agent: I'm sorry to hear that, John. Is the vehicle still drivable?
User: Yes, it's still drivable, just running rough.
Agent: Got it. I'd recommend bringing it in for a diagnostic. When would work best for you?
User: How about Thursday morning?
Agent: Thursday morning works. Let me get that set up for you. To confirm: John Smith, 2019 Toyota Camry, check engine light and rough running, Thursday morning. Is that all correct?
User: Yes, that's right.
Agent: We'll send you a text with the details. Thanks for calling!

call_analysis.issue_summary: Check engine light on, rough idle
